li.label: partial skylight
li.description: It's nice to see some natural light while I'm indoors.

li.label: skylight
li.description: The glass roof provides a beautiful view. It feels much more open in here.

li.label: glass dome
li.description: It almost feels like I'm outside. I love looking up and seeing everything above me.

li.label: exposed by skylight
li.description: There's a window in the roof. I don't like being seen from above.

li.label: hates skylight
li.description: This glass roof makes me feel far too exposed. I'd much rather have solid stone above my head.

li.label: terrified by glass dome
li.description: There's barely any roof at all! I feel completely vulnerable to the sky. Get me into a real room!
